evidence_paragraphs.snippet: [Jon](wiki:Jon_Snow) hears the call of a warhorn, one blast to signify brothers returning. [Qhorin Halfhand](wiki:Qhorin_Halfhand) has arrived, with 100 men from the [Shadow...
